text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, January 18. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
